THE THIRD ANNUAL GRAVY DAY SPECTACULAR - 7 PM 21st DEC 

Poor Kelly returns for the third annual Gravy Day spectacular â a celebration of Paul Kelly's music, Christmas, friends, and of course, a roast dinner with gravy.

Tired of mediocrity, local singer-songwriter Michael McDonagh (Remember the Circus) pulled together an all-star band and a new suit for the inaugural 2022 event in an Islington backyard. In response to overwhelming popular demand, they returned in 2023 to a raucous crowd at The Oak in Tighes Hill.

This year, the all-star band are back at The Oak and will again be supported by fellow all-stars Crowded Hour of Power. That is precisely one hour of Crowded House belters to get you in the mood. To kick things off this year we have a very special bluegrass treat â yet another all-star band, playing songs from Smoke & Foggy Highway.

Come for a dance, a singalong, great food, cold beer, heck, maybe even some Christmas cheer. It's an expensive ol' month, but thanks to The Oak, entry is FREE. Kick off the festive season right with some of Newcastleâs finest musicians playing some of Australiaâs (definitely not New Zealandâs) finest songs. You're not going to want to miss this one - there wonât be another Saturday night gravy day until 2030!

Tag your gal-entine, pal-entine, or valentine below and share this post in your stories for a chance to WIN a $100 voucher to indulge in wining and dining at The Oak. Winner will be drawn 6 pm Monday 12th Feb. 

Each @ tag equals one entry, Casanovas get extra chances! 

t's and c's apply - read below. 

1. The competition is open to residents of Australia aged 18 years and over, excluding employees of The Oak Tighes Hill.
2.The competition begins at 6:00 PM AEST on February 7th, 2024, and ends at 6:00 PM AEST on February 12th, 2024.
3. To enter, participants must tag their Valentine in the comments section of the competition post and share the post to their Instagram story.
4. The prize consists of a $100 voucher from The Oak Tighes Hill, valid for 12 months from the date of issue. The prize is non-transferable and cannot be exchanged for cash or other alternatives.
5. The winner will be randomly selected from eligible entries on Monday, February 12th, 2024, at 6:00 PM AEST.
6. The winner will be notified via direct message on Instagram within 48 hours of the draw. The winner must respond within 7 days to claim the prize. If the winner does not respond within this timeframe, a new winner may be selected.
8. Participants agree to release The Oak Tighes Hill and Instagram from any liability arising from or related to their participation in the competition.
9.This competition is not sponsored, endorsed, or associated with Instagram in any way.
10.The competition is governed by the laws of Australia. Any disputes arising from or related to the competition shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Australia.
11. For questions or concerns about the competition, please contact The Oak Tighes Hill via Instagram direct message or email at josh@joshnicholsoncatering.com
12. By participating in the competition, participants acknowledge that they have read, understood, and agree to comply with these terms and conditions.
